name: Khan Resources Inc.
description: Khan Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based company that was historically involved in the development of the Dornod uranium property in Mongolia. Following the resolution of its international arbitration regarding the project, the company shifted its strategic focus. Currently, Khan Resources Inc. operates primarily through its investment segment, which includes interests in cryptocurrencies and blockchain technology. The company is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) under the ticker symbol KRI and maintains its corporate headquarters in Toronto, Ontario.
